h1a00c463g54f0g42dega97ag7a6be7307cd4: Shka'keth! I have followed protocol. He does not speak for Vlaakith!
h863cb627g4c2ag449ag8e5egadf1ee1d74d2: We carry the weapon he seeks. It must be powerful, for a kith'rak to betray his own Queen's children.
h511d3bd9gf367g410fgac1egb4d0f1bdad8e: And you. I trusted you. Has all my kin betrayed me?
h3ce1a7b1g0e83g4846gb2edg043056f2097a: And you. I trusted you. Must every ally betray me?
h3205561bg137fg4e7dg8940g08a3132935d1: The knight said Vlaakith ordered the attack. Could it be true?
h55f99cffg77f6g46ddg8c00gf83c6554a886: Betray? The knight seemed to act on Vlaakith's behalf.
h6693e994g3aa8g4e6fgb1a1ge2d6ebff3580: I have devoted my life to my queen. I will be her chosen. It is my due!
h24970b91g3fe8g40b9gb74eg01f7c96bddee: I have devoted my life to my queen. I will be her chosen. It is my due!
ha8c0ad3fga31eg438bgb1b3gf98fdfc77df8: Search the bodies. We might find a way to the crèche.
h1e473f83gf8d3g4abfgb16egb60e9159c85a: And beware the skies. We are watched.
hc4a40bbbg7f2fg4bc7ga40cgd80fb7774bb3: Forward, through the pass - the crèche is near.
h48449997g41fbg419ag8e96gb7a5bc692400: Betray? The knight seemed to act on Vlaakith's behalf.
h1e9a4188g25e5g49f7g845bgc323058b8f55: Sorry. I shouldn't have acted that way.
hc2848f15gf86ag4c59gb34ag16ddf169a9d9: You inflict the wound, then expect to heal it with 'sorries'. Keep them.
h9550a521g339eg417ag8902gef15e4270594: Control yourself and focus. Healing is our first priority.
hba70d547ga04cg4215g9dbfg183c333bb434: You dare take the high road after digging our trench? Spare me.
h878e518fg70f6g418fgad34g11e5bd58202e: Focus. A cure is our top priority.
h08d224ccgfcd0g4cc1gad96g39427839aa9d: Look upward. The dragon-rider will return, I am sure of it.
h734a71ecg8d83g4850g96eeg51dedae4a71c: Yes. We must move, and quickly.
hf1f13b28gedf3g49d6g8691g1c7152f215fd: This weapon must be powerful, for a kith'rak to betray his own Queen's children.
